description: Defines which CPX-AP module types are compatible with which automated tests.

output_modules.description: Modules that have digital or analog outputs (NumOfOutputs > 0).

input_modules.description: Modules that have digital or analog inputs (NumOfInputs > 0).

cc_modules.description: Modules that support the Condition Counter (CC) parameter (20094/20095). Currently only CPX-AP-I digital I/O modules with CC hardware support.

valve_terminals.description: Valve terminals with condition counter support (module codes 8225, 8234, etc.).

bus_modules.description: Bus interface / power modules that provide system-level functions.

output-toggle.description: Toggles each output channel HIGH then LOW and verifies the state changes.

output-pulse.description: Pulses each output for a configurable duration and reads it back.

input-read.description: Reads all input channels and verifies they return valid boolean/integer values.

connection-validation.description: Validates cross-module I/O wiring by pulsing source outputs and reading target inputs.

condition-counter.description: Checks if a module supports Condition Counter (CC) and verifies the CC parameter.

valve-condition-counter.description: Sets condition counter setpoint (param 20094), toggles valves past the setpoint, verifies diagnosis and readback value (param 20095).

valve-toggle.description: Toggles all valve channels ON then OFF and verifies the state changes.

valve-diagnosis.description: Reads the module diagnosis information and checks for expected fault codes.

remanent-params.description: Writes test values to remanent parameters (20118, 20119), simulates a power cycle, and verifies values persist.

system-diagnosis.description: Reads global system diagnosis registers and verifies the system is healthy.

io-link-read.description: Reads process data from IO-Link channels.

io-link-write.description: Writes process data to IO-Link channels and reads it back.
